sellers_note: Rugged, reliable, and built to perform, this 2018 Ford F-150 XLT 4WD SuperCrew with a 5.5 bed is powered by a strong and efficient engine paired with a smooth automatic transmission, delivering impressive capability for both work and everyday driving. The 4WD system provides confidence in all conditions, while the spacious SuperCrew cab offers plenty of room for passengers and gear. Equipped with features like a touchscreen infotainment system with Bluetooth® connectivity, backup camera, cruise control, keyless entry, power windows and locks, and Fords durable aluminum body construction, this F-150 is the perfect combination of strength, comfort, and versatility.
